mapper.select: SELECT m.*, f.name as factoryName, f.factory_id as factoryId FROM navigation_map m LEFT JOIN factory_model f ON m.factory_model_id = f.id WHERE m.factory_model_id = #{factoryModelId} AND m.del_flag = '0' ORDER BY m.floor_number ASC, m.name ASC

SELECT m.*, f.name as factoryName, f.factory_id as factoryId FROM navigation_map m LEFT JOIN factory_model f ON m.factory_model_id = f.id WHERE m.factory_model_id = #{factoryModelId} AND m.floor_number = #{floorNumber} AND m.del_flag = '0' LIMIT 1
